# Getting help with KattoUI

Thanks for using KattoUI! This document describes the best ways to get help.

## Documentation

Start with the project documentation:

- [README](https://github.com/kattoui/kattoUI#readme) — quick start, stack, and workspace layout
- [ARCHITECTURE.md](./ARCHITECTURE.md) — system design and key decisions
- [adr/](./adr/) — architecture decision records
- [rfcs/](./rfcs/) — requests for comments and upcoming changes

## GitHub Discussions

For questions, ideas, configuration help, or general conversation, use
[GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/kattoui/kattoUI/discussions).

## Discord

Join the KattoUI community Discord: **https://discord.gg/kattoui** (placeholder)

## Reporting bugs and requesting features

- [Bug report](https://github.com/kattoui/kattoUI/issues/new?template=bug_report.md)
- [Feature request](https://github.com/kattoui/kattoUI/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)

## Security issues

Please do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities. See
[SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md) for how to report them privately.
